name: Cruiser Reloaded — Reimagine Retro Cruiser as a Complete Arcade Game
summary: Turn the lost Phaser Retro Cruiser into a complete, addictive modern arcade game — not a faithful rebuild. Use the minified original and assets as a springboard, then invent the systems that make the run loop irresistible.

source.description: The deployed build of 'Retro Cruiser': index.html, a minified index.min.js (Phaser 2.0.7 + game logic), phaser.map, CSS, and the full original asset set. The original is a short side-scrolling shooter with fuel/health, rocks, drones, weapon tiers, and boosts — incomplete as a modern product. Live reference: https://ralphunlimited.com/blog/retro-cruiser/
